services.label: What We Do
services.heading: Services
services.subheading: From AI strategy to shipping production apps — we cover the full spectrum so you can focus on your business.

about.label: The Team
about.heading: Who We Are
about.subheading: A sister and a brother, a few thousand miles apart, shipping things together.
about.storyHeading: Once upon a time, we argued about who broke the iPad. Now we build solutions together.
about.storyBody1: We grew up in Turkey, moved to the United States to pursue our education, and somewhere along the way realized we were both building things — just separately. Dastugo is our answer to that.
about.storyBody2: We bring together Serap's deep expertise in AI and data science with Dogan's full-stack and mobile chops. The result is a small team with a wide range — from AI strategy to shipping production apps to automating workflows that actually save people time.

contact.label: Let's Talk
contact.heading: Start a Project
contact.body: Have an idea? Need to automate something? Want to build an AI agent for your team? Drop us a message — we're fast to respond and love a good challenge.

contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Two siblings building AI solutions, custom software, and automation systems between Turkey and the United States.
